highlights.description: Initial release: batteries-included distribution composing omnidevx-core, omni-github, and omni-openai behind one import path

added.description: Re-exported canonical types, event/mode/severity constants, and provider constructors (Claude Code, Codex, git, GitHub) under a single `omnidevx` import path
`NewDefault` for composing local Claude Code and Codex collectors against the current machine's default stores
`Engine` runs an arbitrary set of `core.Collector`s over one request; one collector failing does not stop the others, and errors are joined with their source named
`Events` flattens collection results from multiple collectors into a single event slice

tests.description: Multi-collector aggregation, per-collector failure isolation with error joining, Add/Collectors chaining, context cancellation, and provider-constructor composition tests

documentation.description: README documenting the batteries-included distribution, the OmniDevX/OmniDXI distinction, available collectors, and usage examples
README shields for CI, lint, SAST, godoc, mkdocs, visualization, and license
Fix README badges that pointed at omnidevx-core instead of omnidevx, and update the Collectors table to include Git and GitHub
MkDocs site (Material theme, matching omni-github/omni-openai/omnidevx-core) with a home page, Collectors reference, and v0.1.0 release notes

dependencies.description: `github.com/plexusone/omnidevx-core` v0.1.0 for the canonical event model
`github.com/plexusone/omni-github` v0.5.0 for the GitHub DevX collector
`github.com/plexusone/omni-openai` v0.6.0 for the Codex CLI collector

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions workflows (go-ci, go-lint, go-sast-codeql), Dependabot config, and golangci-lint settings shared with the other omni-* repos
